result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make sure that everyone—no matter where they’re born—has reliable access to the basics they need to live a dignified life: nutritious food, clean water, safe shelter, basic health care, and a quality education. It’s a single shift, but it tackles the root causes of so much suffering and opens the door for people everywhere to pursue their potential, contribute to their communities, and build a more just and thriving world.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I would make sure that everyone—no matter where they’re born—has reliable access to the basics they need to live a dignified life: nutritious food, clean water, safe shelter, basic health care, and a quality education. It’s a single shift, but it tackles the root causes of so much suffering and opens the door for people everywhere to pursue their potential, contribute to their communities, and build a more just and thriving world.
